data.content: Revised plan (v3) anchored to the live contract post c8f4+0d93 shipping. Identifies 6 precise gaps with 0% or partial coverage: (1) unknown ArtifactTarget warning behavior in TOML/JSON loaders, (2) state-level output fallback chain, (3) access_hint propagation to prompt template params, (4) resolve_output_specific_sections unit tests for non-remote_main/pr targets and None, (5) output=None in build_prompt_params, (6) per-action output variation through full StepMetadata resolution. ~120 new test lines across 3 files (tests_parsing.rs, step_metadata_tests.rs, mod.rs tests). No implementation changes needed — pure regression coverage. No Playwright needed.
